children.text:
**Get enterprise-grade music data analytics for your team.**

Ready to scale your music data operations? Our new Ultra plan brings you everything you need for professional-grade music analytics, whether you're managing a roster, running A&R, or building data-driven strategies.

• Access all Premium features plus enhanced data limits, priority support, and advanced collaboration tools designed for teams and power users.
• Perfect for labels, management companies, publishers, and agencies who need deeper insights and more comprehensive data coverage.

Check it out on [the Pricing page](https://chartmetric.com/pricing) to see if Ultra fits your workflow!
